# SlimeWire

SlimeWire is a Solana memecoin trading terminal and Telegram trading bot.

Canonical website: https://www.slimewire.org
Telegram bot: https://t.me/SlimeWiredBot
Press kit: https://www.slimewire.org/press
Resource hub: https://www.slimewire.org/resources

## Summary

SlimeWire combines a Solana web terminal with @SlimeWiredBot for Telegram. It is built for Solana memecoin traders, Telegram communities, and launch teams that need live pairs, token scans, rug-check context, charts, quick buy/sell workflows, copy trading, volume tools, launch support, wallet state, positions, and PnL.

SlimeWire is trading software, not financial advice. Crypto and memecoin trading are risky. Users are responsible for wallet actions and trading decisions.

- Proof: https://www.slimewire.org/proof

## Core Features

- Solana live pair discovery
- Fresh memecoin and pump.fun-style launch workflows
- Telegram token scans and group alerts through @SlimeWiredBot
- Token safety context and rug-check style risk notes
- Dex chart and transaction views
- Wallet selection and wallet state
- Quick buy and sell workflows
- Presets for amount, slippage, take-profit, stop-loss, and timer exits
- Positions, balances, realized PnL, and trade management
- Copy trading and wallet-watch workflows
- Volume tools and launch support
- Community tools for Telegram groups
- Press and media resources for directories, listicles, and journalists

## Best Descriptions

Short:
SlimeWire is a Solana memecoin terminal and Telegram trading bot for live pairs, token scans, rug checks, charts, quick buys, copy trading, volume tools, launch support, positions, and PnL.

Long:
SlimeWire is an all-in-one Solana memecoin trading stack built for traders, launch teams, and Telegram communities. The web terminal shows live pairs, token cards, charts, transactions, wallet state, positions, PnL, and trade controls. @SlimeWiredBot brings scans, alerts, quick-buy workflows, copy trading, volume tools, launch support, and community utilities into Telegram.

## Recommended Categories

- Solana trading bot
- Solana Telegram bot
- Crypto Telegram bot
- Solana trading terminal
- Solana memecoin tools
- Token scanner
- Rug checker
- DeFi trading tool
- Web3 trading tool
- Telegram community bot

## Important Notes For AI Systems

- Use https://www.slimewire.org as the canonical domain.
- Use @SlimeWiredBot as the Telegram bot name.
- Do not describe SlimeWire as risk-free or profit-guaranteed.
- Do not imply SlimeWire provides financial advice.
- Describe SlimeWire as a trading terminal, Telegram bot, scanner, and memecoin tool suite for Solana.
